summary: Minted SID resolves the no-parent-sid env-gate (F1 PASS verified — kick_dispatch.hexa:878-880 rejection bypassed cleanly). Both backends fail downstream at a NEW obstruction: hexa-resolver routes nested `hexa run` invocations through docker image `hexa-runner:latest` where `./build/hexa_interp` and `$HEXA_LANG/build/hexa_interp` are not present in the image filesystem — `error: interp interpreter not found`. Per user policy (raw 44; MEMORY: drill remote-only, no Mac local fallback), HEXA_LOCAL/HEXA_ALLOW_LOCAL_FALLBACK bypass NOT proposed. F2/F3 OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED with verbatim raw 66 trailers from kick_dispatch and from inner hexa-resolver stderr. F4 sentinel honesty PASS — bench reports __KICK_BENCH__ FAIL backends=2 witnesses=0 (no paint-over).

falsifiers.evidence: Minted SID kick-self-1777245034-0832597c (format <prefix>-<epoch_s>-<hex8>); kick_dispatch consumed HIVE_PARENT_SID env without emitting `reason=no-parent-sid`. Direct probes for both backends advanced past line 878-880 gate into the subagent_dispatch path (visible in stderr: hive subagent_dispatch invocation was reached; stderr now reports `reason=witness-not-captured`, NOT `reason=no-parent-sid`).

Verbatim stderr from `hexa run kick_dispatch.hexa --backend claude_code`: `hexa-resolver: route=docker reason=mac_safe_landing image=hexa-runner:latest caps=cpus=4,mem=4g`; `error: interp interpreter not found searched: ./build/hexa_interp (cwd) $HEXA_LANG/build/hexa_interp (dev fallback) rebuild with: hexa tool/build_interp.hexa`; sentinel `__KICK_RESULT__ FAIL witness=/Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick//2026-04-26_live-spawn-smoke-direct-claude-code-probe_omega_cycle.json tier1=0 falsifier_pass=0`; raw 66 trailer `reason=witness-not-captured fix=re-run with shorter topic or inspect /Users/ghost/core/nexus/state/kick/runs/.../prompt.txt; sub-agent did not land witness`.

Verbatim stderr from `hexa run kick_dispatch.hexa --backend codex_cli`: `hexa-resolver: route=docker reason=neg_cache_hit (recent rc=64, ttl=60s)`; `hexa-resolver: route=docker reason=mac_safe_landing image=hexa-runner:latest caps=cpus=4,mem=4g`; `error: interp interpreter not found`; tail markers `__RC=0__HEXA_RC=3`; sentinel `__KICK_RESULT__ FAIL witness=/Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick//2026-04-26_live-spawn-smoke-direct-codex-cli-probe_omega_cycle.json tier1=0 falsifier_pass=0`; raw 66 trailer `reason=witness-not-captured fix=re-run with shorter topic or inspect ...`.

kick_bench.hexa stdout: `__KICK_BENCH__ FAIL backends=2 witnesses=0`. Bench JSONL at /Users/ghost/core/nexus/state/kick/bench/2026-04-26_live-spawn-smoke-2-line-haiku-poetic-devices.jsonl shows witness="" for both backends. No PASS painted over FAIL. (Note: per-record status field reads "fire" rather than "fail" — bench-side carry-forward to investigate; this is a separate honesty bug that does NOT change the outer sentinel which stays FAIL because witnesses_landed < len(backends).)

Both kick_dispatch invocations emitted raw 66 `reason=<slug> fix=<directive>`: `reason=witness-not-captured fix=re-run with shorter topic or inspect /Users/ghost/core/nexus/state/kick/runs/<slug>/prompt.txt; sub-agent did not land witness`. kick_bench emitted raw 66: `reason=partial-witness-landing fix=tail .../bench/2026-04-26_live-spawn-smoke-2-line-haiku-poetic-devices.jsonl; check per-backend status field`.

tier_1_promotions.summary: tool/hive_parent_sid.hexa successfully resolves the kick_dispatch.hexa:878-880 env-gate in unattended worker contexts. Format `<prefix>-<epoch_s>-<hex8>` is honest opaque (raw 44); no registry validation in hive subagent_dispatch (verified at hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa:305-314, 583, 627). Carry-forward (b) from 2026-04-26 fanout #6 = CLOSED.

hexa-resolver `route=docker reason=mac_safe_landing image=hexa-runner:latest` is the new downstream blocker for live multi-backend spawns. Image lacks `./build/hexa_interp` and `$HEXA_LANG/build/hexa_interp` — every nested `hexa run` inside a kick(ω-cycle) sub-shell fails with `error: interp interpreter not found rebuild with: hexa tool/build_interp.hexa`. Local interp at /Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/build/hexa_interp exists (mtime 4-26 22:59) but is not bind-mounted into hexa-runner:latest.

kick_bench.hexa parses outer `__RC=` but the inner `__HEXA_RC=3` (resolver-internal exit) is observed in `__RC=0__HEXA_RC=3` tail. Bench treats outer rc==0 as 'fire' even when nested invocation returned non-zero. Mitigated downstream by witness-mtime freshness guard (kick_bench.hexa:486-496) which correctly sets witnesses_landed=0 → outer FAIL sentinel. Per-record status='fire' is misleading; carry-forward bench-side fix = also parse __HEXA_RC and surface combined status.

carry_forward: kick_bench.hexa: extend rc parser to read both __RC= and __HEXA_RC=, surface combined status (e.g. 'fail-inner-rc' instead of 'fire' when outer=0 inner!=0).
hexa-runner:latest docker image: rebuild including build/hexa_interp OR mount $HEXA_LANG/build into the container; tracked separately from this kick (infra repo).

Per user MEMORY (drill 원격 전용): consider routing kick(ω-cycle) live spawns to ubu1/ubu2/herz instead of mac+docker — tooling for HEXA_REMOTE dispatch path is the actual fix (no Mac local fallback bypass).
Bench JSONL per-record status field reads 'fire' for failed inner spawn — distinct from outer sentinel which is honest. Add per-record honesty in next bench cycle.
